title: Summarize issue evidence for supervisor review
purpose: Transform source project planning artifacts into a sanitized decision input.

input_artifacts.public_safety: No raw private transcript or provider endpoint included.
input_artifacts.verifier: Supervisor checks source against live issue or tracked roadmap.

transformation: Worker or script summarizes source evidence into a bounded proposal artifact.

implementation.name: FreshForge or project-native CLI
implementation.notes: Project-native tool performs deterministic work; Agent Workbench records evidence and economics.

output_artifacts.provenance: Generated from supplied source issue by local worker.
output_artifacts.public_safety: Ignored runtime artifact; promote only sanitized findings.

output_artifacts.provenance: Supervisor-edited summary derived from accepted worker claims.
output_artifacts.public_safety: Tracked sanitized note with no raw transcript.
output_artifacts.supervisor_decision: Promote accepted claims and reject unsupported claims.

manual_checks: Supervisor checked accepted claims against source artifacts.

supervisor_decision.rationale: Generated artifact was useful after supervisor verification.
